search_query.research_question: How do AI agents and large language models automate systematic literature review?
search_query.population: systematic review, literature review, scoping review, evidence synthesis
search_query.intervention: large language model, LLM, GPT, AI agent, machine learning, NLP, natural language processing
search_query.outcome: title screening, abstract screening, PRISMA flow, data extraction, quality assessment

iterations.pubmed_query: ("systematic review"[Title/Abstract] OR "literature review"[Title/Abstract] OR "scoping review"[Title/Abstract] OR "evidence synthesis"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("large language model"[Title/Abstract] OR LLM[Title/Abstract] OR GPT[Title/Abstract] OR "AI agent"[Title/Abstract] OR "machine learning"[Title/Abstract] OR NLP[Title/Abstract] OR "natural language processing"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("title screening"[Title/Abstract] OR "abstract screening"[Title/Abstract] OR "PRISMA flow"[Title/Abstract] OR "data extraction"[Title/Abstract] OR "quality assessment"[Title/Abstract])
iterations.semantic_query: systematic review large language model LLM GPT title screening
